phase_title: Execution Boundary No-Go Milestone Summary / Transition Planning
no_go_confirmation: No real backend invocation. No adapter execution. No subprocess execution. No shell execution. No network call. No shell interception. No Telegram inbound. No Telegram polling. No remote shell. No actual enforcement. No automatic apply. No apply execution. No patch parsing. No commit authorization. No push authorization. No real AI backend calls. No executable artifact-only invocation path. No execution enablement flag. No execution availability toggle. No cryptographic signing. No remote attestation. No database-backed audit storage. No shell mediation. No rollback execution. No file mutation rollback. No automatic restore. No git reset/checkout/revert execution. Telegram remains outbound-only. Execution remains unavailable. All authorization flags remain False. Phase 100 track closed. Transition recommends 101A.
summary: Phase 100F complete: Execution Boundary No-Go Milestone Summary. Closes the Phase 100 track (5 subphases: gap analysis, model, contract freeze, trust hardening, boundary review). Final: design/model-only no-go evidence layer. 188 no-go tests + 583 combined with 99 layer. 24 safety invariants. No actual enforcement. No execution-capable boundary. Transition recommends 101A.
